title: Oil prices resume gains after Iran accuses U.S. of breaching ceasefire deal
summary_full: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.
summary_public: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.

IR.label: negative
